awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Ramon Nuno
awards.detail: Range: 26 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Men's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Esteban Cornejo
awards.detail: Volatility: 0.0 — nearly the same percentile every week

awards.title: Women's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Paula Rubio
awards.detail: Range: 14 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Women's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Daisy Cervantes
awards.detail: Volatility: 1.2 — nearly the same percentile every week

wrapped.headline: The Rookie
wrapped.tagline: First Open in the books. Now they know what to train for.

wrapped.headline: The Builder
wrapped.tagline: Every Open is a chance to see progress. This one is just the beginning.

wrapped.headline: Open Athlete
wrapped.tagline: Signed up, showed up, and finished all three workouts. That puts them ahead of most.

wrapped.headline: The Contender
wrapped.tagline: Deep in the top tier. Consistent, competitive, and dangerous.

wrapped.headline: The Veteran
wrapped.tagline: 5 Opens and counting. Experience shows in the consistency.

wrapped.headline: The Spark Plug
wrapped.tagline: Came out firing on 26.1 and set the tone for the gym.

wrapped.headline: The Closer
wrapped.tagline: Saved the best for last. When it mattered most, they showed up.
